mapper.select: SELECT ab.ai_block_idx "idx", ab.bno "bno", ab.place_id "placeId", ab.ai_start_time "startTime", ab.ai_end_time "endTime", ab.ai_travel_time "travelTime", p.name "placeName", p.lat "lat", p.lng "lng" FROM ai_blocks ab INNER JOIN places p ON p.place_id = ab.place_id WHERE bno = #{bno} ORDER BY ai_start_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_blocks(ai_block_idx, bno, place_id, ai_start_time, ai_end_time, ai_travel_time) VALUES(SEQ_AI_BLOCK.nextval, #{bno}, #{placeId}, TO_DATE(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{travelTime})

INSERT INTO blocks(block_idx, bno, place_id, start_time, end_time, checked_ai, travel_time, color_idx) SELECT SEQ_BLOCK.nextval, #{bno}, place_id, ai_start_time, ai_end_time, 0, ai_travel_time, 1 FROM ai_blocks WHERE bno = #{bno}
